SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

Prices also are reaccelerating in these other areas: Here's some of the places where prices are rising fast for consumers.. 2026-05-12: The stock market isn't ignoring Iran. But slim driver savings could strain a key federal fund: President Donald Trump floated a federal gas tax suspension. If enacted, here's how that could impact consumers. . 2026-05-12: Social Security COLA for 2027 may be higher as inflation rises, new estimates find: As the pace of inflation increases, that may lead to a higher Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027, according to new expert estimates.. 2026-05-12: Companies start getting tariff refunds after Supreme Court decision: After the Supreme Court ruled some of President Trump's tariffs unconstitutional, the first wave of tariff refunds have begun flowing in.. 2026-05-12: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's pied-à-terre property tax is moving ahead. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. ". 2026-05-12: CNBC Daily Open: Can Starmer ‘keep calm and carry on?': U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces a crunch cabinet meeting this morning, after failing to quell a growing party rebellion.. 2026-05-12: Trump puts Taiwan arms sales, Hong Kong jailed activist Lai on agenda ahead of meeting with Xi: Trump said Monday that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai would be among the issues at the summit in Beijing. . 2026-05-12: Asia's trillion-dollar titans are powering — and distorting — its fastest growing stock markets: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi stock markets have been seeing record breaking rallies. The stunning surge leaves experts wondering if this growth hinges largely on a few AI-linked semiconductor giants.. 2026-05-12: Markets raise chances for a Fed rate hike following hot inflation report: Market pricing took virtually any chance of a cut off the table between now and the end of 2027.. 2026-05-12: Analysis: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency : There is no quick fix to the economic and political damage from the war. . 2026-05-12: Amazon accelerates delivery race with 30-minute drop-offs in dozens of U.S. cities: Amazon has been gradually speeding up its delivery windows, after getting customers hooked on two-day and next-day shipping. . 2026-05-12: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi : China experts anticipate Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.. 2026-05-12: Asia markets trade mixed as investors weigh Trump’s ceasefire warning: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors weighed fresh doubts over the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.. 2026-05-12: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Trump and Xi face a test over AI control: The stakes for AI security have risen sharply in the runup to the first trip to China by a sitting U.S. president in nearly a decade. . 2026-05-12: 'Starmer drama': UK borrowing costs hit post-2008 peak as leadership fears hit bond markets: More than 70 Labour MPs have called on Keir Starmer to resign.
